title: Planning integration proposal
description: Checked-in feature-branch proposal for a later target-branch Planning lifecycle transition.

kind.description: Schema discriminator for Planning integration proposal records.

id.description: Stable proposal identifier used by apply and receipt records.

status.description: Proposal lifecycle state before or after target-branch apply.

phase.description: Human-readable proposal phase derived from status and apply state.

requested_transition.description: Planning lifecycle transition requested for target-branch apply.

id.description: Planning owner id affected by the proposed transition.

ref.description: Repo-relative owner record path affected by the proposed transition.

owner.description: Planning owner subject affected by the proposed transition.

external_ref.description: Optional external issue or tracker reference associated with the proposal.

proof_refs.description: Evidence references supporting the requested transition.

parent_boundary.description: Boundary that keeps parent, lane, and aggregate truth independent on feature branches.

preserved_invariants.description: Invariants the proposal asserts are preserved until target-branch apply.

expected_subject_revision.description: Subject revision expected by target-branch compare-and-apply.

expected_planning_revision.description: Advisory Planning revision captured when the proposal was written.

created_at.description: Creation timestamp recorded by the proposal writer.

updated_at.description: Last proposal update timestamp recorded by propose or apply.

integrated_at.description: Timestamp set when the target branch applies the proposal.

integration_receipt_ref.description: Repo-relative receipt path written when the proposal is applied.

proposal_revision.description: Content revision token for the proposal record.

proposal.description: Authority statement for feature-branch proposal records.

integrated_truth.description: Authority statement for target-branch integration receipts.

non_authority.description: Planning surfaces the proposal must not rewrite or claim as authoritative.

authority_boundary.description: Explicit boundary between branch proposal authority and integrated target truth.
